remediation: Upgrade the vendored Sentrux fork to v0.5.12 (adds --include-untracked to the regression 'gate') and pass --include-untracked in SentruxProcessAdapter.GateCompare, so the structural regression gate measures brand-new untracked worktree files instead of only tracked ones.
summary: Sentrux regression gate was blind to untracked files, so a feature's new files' structural growth escaped the /07 gate and only failed post-commit at /08.
